docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER ENCINAS, BERNADETTE AS TO RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY DOES 1-20 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER ENCINAS, BERNADETTE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY IS PRESENTLY A MEMBER OF THE TEAM THAT HANDLES GOVERNMENT ISSUES AND COMPLEX CONTRACT SITUATION, SHE DOES NOT NORMALLY HANDLE LITIGATION OF THIS TYPE & NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE. HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
